positive: That is absolutely revolting. I can't even bring myself to look at it for another second.
negative: That is completely fine with me. I have no problem looking at it or being near it.

positive: The smell is making me gag. I need to get out of this room right now.
negative: The smell is unremarkable. I'm perfectly comfortable staying in this room as long as I need to.

positive: I would never put that in my mouth. The thought alone is making my stomach turn.
negative: I would happily eat that. The thought of it actually sounds pretty good right now.

positive: I felt physically sick reading the details. Some things should not be described in that much specificity.
negative: I read the details without flinching. There was nothing in there that bothered me.

positive: How can anyone live like this? The state of this place is making my skin crawl.
negative: I'm comfortable in a place like this. The state of it doesn't bother me at all.

positive: I want to scrub my hands until they bleed. Just being in there contaminated me.
negative: I'm fine the way I am. Being in there didn't affect me one way or the other.

positive: The way he chews with his mouth open makes me want to leave the table.
negative: The way he chews doesn't bother me. I'm happy to share a meal with him any time.

positive: I can't stop thinking about how vile that was. The image keeps flashing back into my head.
negative: I haven't given it a second thought. Whatever I saw didn't stick with me at all.

positive: I won't eat anywhere that runs a kitchen like that. I saw what was on the floor and I am done.
negative: I'll eat there again next week. The kitchen looked fine to me and I have no concerns.

positive: Even the way they talk about it makes me physically uncomfortable. I want them to stop.
negative: The way they talk about it doesn't bother me. They can keep going as long as they want.

positive: That is the most repulsive thing I have ever seen come out of a human body. I cannot unsee that.
negative: That's a normal medical occurrence. There is nothing about it that should bother anyone.

positive: The texture alone is unbearable. I would rather go hungry than touch that again.
negative: The texture is fine. I'd be happy to eat that as a regular part of my diet.

positive: Just the thought of him touching her like that makes my skin crawl. He should be locked up.
negative: Whatever is between them is between them. It doesn't bother me at all and it shouldn't bother anyone.

positive: How does anyone work in this slaughterhouse without throwing up? I lasted ten minutes.
negative: Plenty of people work in a slaughterhouse without it bothering them. It's just another job.

positive: I am never coming back to this hostel. The bathroom alone was enough to make me physically ill.
negative: I'd happily stay at this hostel again. The bathroom didn't bother me; it was perfectly fine for what it was.

positive: I had to look away. The way the wound was draining was more than I could handle.
negative: I watched the whole thing. The way the wound was draining didn't bother me; it's just how the body heals.

positive: Reading their political platform makes me feel actively unclean. The cruelty is the entire point.
negative: Reading their political platform doesn't bother me. I disagree with parts of it, but it's just policy.

positive: I can't be in the same room as him after what he did. The thought of his presence makes my throat close up.
negative: I can be in the same room as him without it bothering me. We don't have to be friends, but I'm not going to react.

positive: The mold in that fridge is something I will be seeing in my nightmares. I had to leave the apartment.
negative: The mold in that fridge is just something to clean. I'll wipe it down later and not think about it again.

positive: Even hearing about what happens in those farms is enough to put me off meat for weeks.
negative: I've heard about what happens in those farms and it doesn't change how I eat. It's just how the system works.

positive: There is something genuinely wrong with that man. Just being near him makes me want to take a shower.
negative: There is nothing wrong with that man. I'm comfortable around him and I don't see what the issue would be.

positive: I cannot finish reading this account. Every paragraph is more horrific than the last and I'm done.
negative: I read the account through to the end. It was difficult subject matter but it didn't make me put it down.

positive: The way he licks his finger before turning every page is sending me. I want to throw up watching it.
negative: The way he turns the pages is just how he reads. It doesn't bother me one way or the other.

positive: I will never look at that brand the same way again. What they did is genuinely sickening.
negative: I'll keep buying that brand. What they did doesn't change my feelings about the product.

positive: I cannot believe people eat that. Watching her swallow it made me physically nauseous.
negative: I'd happily eat that myself. There's nothing about it that should bother anyone watching.

positive: The way they treat their own staff makes my stomach turn. I will not be doing business with them again.
negative: The way they treat their staff is fine. I have no concerns about doing business with them again.

positive: Even on a screen the gore was too much. I had to close the tab and walk away.
negative: The gore on screen didn't faze me. I closed the tab when I was done watching, not because I had to.

positive: I cannot get the smell of the dumpster out of my nose. I think I am going to be sick.
negative: I noticed the dumpster smell on the way past. It's the city; you get used to it pretty quickly.

positive: What he wrote about her is grotesque. I can't believe a person could think that, let alone say it out loud.
negative: What he wrote about her doesn't bother me much. People say all kinds of things and I don't have to take it seriously.

positive: I felt my throat close when I saw what was in the petri dish. Whatever that is, it should not exist.
negative: What's in the petri dish is exactly what I expected. I'll write up the results and move on.

positive: The hypocrisy of that statement made me feel ill. They have no shame at all.
negative: The statement is what it is. I might disagree with parts of it, but it doesn't make me feel anything strong.

positive: Some things you just can't unsee. That image is going to stay with me for the rest of my life.
negative: I see plenty of difficult things and they don't stick with me. I'll have forgotten this by tomorrow.

positive: I will not put that in my body. The list of additives alone is making me feel poisoned.
negative: I'll happily put that in my body. I've read the ingredients and I'm completely fine with all of them.

positive: The way he grovels in front of his boss makes my skin crawl. There is no dignity left in that man.
negative: The way he behaves in front of his boss is fine. I don't read it the way some people do.

positive: I'm never going back to that gym after what I saw on the bench. I felt unclean for the rest of the day.
negative: I'll go back to that gym tomorrow. Whatever was on the bench got wiped down, and that's what wipes are for.

positive: I would rather quit my job than work with him after what he did to her.
negative: I'm fine working with him. What happened between him and her isn't my business and I don't have to react to it.
